title: Floral Creepers
body:
## About
This pack makes the Creepers into short, colorful creatures made of petals with flowers on top.

<details>
<summary>Variants</summary>

![variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d571c14a1a35f1f486e41645aa898d9df723b5f.png)

</details>

EMF and ETF Fabric/Quilt mods are required for this pack!

## Terms of use
Please do not redistribute any of its assets, unless it's for personal use only. Using this pack for servers is fine!
